channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: GameStop adopts policy to buy Bitcoin, joining other firms
item.description: GameStop Corp., the struggling video-game retailer that became a favorite of retail traders during the meme stock frenzy in 2021, said its board has approved a plan to add Bitcoin as a treasury reserve asset.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Is Lagiacrus coming to Monster Hunter Wilds? Some fans are convinced, and here's why
item.description: Here's whether Lagiacrus is set to return in Monster Hunter Wilds, as well as some info on the last time we saw the sea serpent monster.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: SAP adoption surges in Europe as enterprises embrace cloud
item.description: Enterprises in Germany, Austria, and Switzerland are accelerating their transition to cloud-based ERP solutions, with SAP playing a key role in their digital transformation strategies.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Tiny electric vehicle takes half a parking space
item.description: Toyota's compact electric FT-Me is designed to tackle challenges of city living while offering an accessible and eco-friendly transportation solution.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: The secret to using generative AI effectively
item.description: Do you think generative AI (genAI) sucks? I did. The hype around everything genAI has been over the top and ridiculous for a while now. Especially at the start, most of the tools were flashy, but quickly fell apart if you tried to use them for any serious work purposes.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Cómo hacer frente al cambio cultural de las metodologías ágiles
item.description: Un escaso cuarto de siglo ha pasado desde que un grupo de 17 programadores se reuniese en Utah para debatir sobre viejos y nuevos métodos de desarrollo de software.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Oracle releases ML-optimized GraalVM for JDK 24
item.description: Oracle has released GraalVM for JDK 24, an alternative Java Development Kit tuned to just-released JDK 24 that uses ML (machine learning)-based profile inference to boost peak performance by about 7.9% on average on microservices benchmarks, the company said.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative
item.description: The Trump administration has a '10 out, one in' rule for new regulations, but DoD officials are confident they can finalize the CMMC requirements soon. The post DoD shepherds CMMC through Trump deregulatory initiative first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: War plans group chat raises questions about Signal, cybersecurity
item.description: Top Trump administration national security officials' use of the messaging app Signal is raising new questions about the platform and how the administration is transmitting sensitive government information.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: AI in the Enterprise: 5 key findings of AI usage and threat trends
item.description: Artificial intelligence (AI) has rapidly shifted from buzz to business necessity over the past year—something Zscaler has seen firsthand while pioneering AI-powered solutions and tracking enterprise AI/ML activity in the world’s largest security cloud.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Alcatel-Lucent Enterprise targets IoT, industrial networks with private 5G package
item.description: Alcatel-Lucent Enterprise (ALE) has partnered with Celona to offer a turnkey private 5G package for industrial or IoT networks.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Forget gas stations – EV charging Superhubs are using solar power to solve the most annoying thing about electric motoring
item.description: EV charging Superhubs are popping up across the globe – and these solar-assisted sites could help stamp out electric motoring pain points.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Youngkin vetoes AI regulation legislation in Virginia
item.description: Virginia Gov. Glenn Youngkin (R) vetoed a bill Monday that would regulate artificial intelligence (AI) in his state. Youngkin said he vetoed H.B. 2094 because it would establish a “burdensome” framework for AI.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: 2025 global network outage report and internet health check
item.description: The reliability of services delivered by ISPs, cloud providers and conferencing services is critical for enterprise organizations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Napster sold to tech commerce company for $207 million
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A brand that was notoriously connected to music piracy before reemerging as a subscription music service has been sold to Infinite Reality for $207 million.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Waymo plans to bring its driverless taxis to Washington in 2026
item.description: Waymo on Tuesday added Washington to its pioneering robotaxi service's steadily expanding list of U.S. markets, although passengers will have to wait until next year until they can take a driverless ride around the nation's capital city.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Tesla sales fall by 49% in Europe even as the electric vehicle market grows
item.description: European sales of Tesla electric vehicles tumbled 49% in the first two months of the year even as overall sales of EVs grew.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Otter.ai’s voice-activated AI agent can answer questions during online meetings
item.description: Otter.ai, which is primarily known for its voice-to-text transcription service, is rolling out a voice-activated AI agent that will participate in and answer questions during online calls.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: A European startup scrubs its attempt to launch an orbital rocket on its first test flight
item.description: OSLO, Norway (AP) — A private European aerospace company scrubbed its attempt on Monday to launch the first test flight of its orbital launch vehicle from Norway.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Revolutionary Weather Forecasting System Developed by Researchers - Aardvark Weather
item.description: Aardvark Weather, a new AI-based weather forecasting system developed by researchers at the University of Cambridge and partners, promises to revolutionize the field of meteorology with tens of times more accurate forecasts and significantly reduced computing power requirements.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Android versions: A living history from 1.0 to 16
item.description: What a long, strange trip it’s been. From its inaugural release to today, Android has transformed visually, conceptually and functionally — time and time again. Google’s mobile operating system may have started out scrappy, but holy moly, has it ever evolved.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Nvidia launches research center to accelerate quantum computing breakthrough
item.description: In a strategic move that could reshape the future of computing, Nvidia is establishing the Nvidia Accelerated Quantum Research Center (NVAQC) in Boston, where the worlds of quantum hardware and AI supercomputing will converge to tackle what many consider computing’s final frontier.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: The Perils of Not Having an AI Strategy: Top Stories from InfoWorld
item.description: As the world becomes increasingly dependent on artificial intelligence, companies without a clear AI strategy risk falling behind. From shadow IT to highly adaptive UIs, discover how genAI is impacting developer communities and what you can do to stay ahead.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: PEAK:AIO adds power, density to AI storage server
item.description: PEAK:AIO, maker of a dedicated AI storage infrastructure server software, has released a new version of its AI Data Server, with emphasis on performance, density, and sustainability.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Meta unveils new AR glasses with heart rate monitoring
item.description: Meta recently introduced its new augmented reality glasses with sensor technology that opens up new possibilities for research and development in AR applications.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Amazon ends little-used privacy feature that let Echo users opt out of sending recordings to company
item.description: Amazon is ending a little-used privacy feature that let some users of its Echo smart speaker prevent their voice commands from going to the company's cloud.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
